comment: Typecheck-only project: tests/scripts run via vitest/tsx, nothing consumes compiled output. noEmit prevents a bare `tsc` from emitting .js/.d.ts INTO src and shadowing the .ts sources under vitest's bundler resolution.
comment2: Resolve @akis/shared from its in-repo SOURCE (sibling shared/) rather than the node_modules workspace link. In a git worktree that link is shared with the MAIN checkout, so it must keep pointing at main's shared/; this source mapping is what lets THIS worktree typecheck against its own (possibly-ahead) shared/src. Post-merge in main the path resolves to main's shared identically, so the mapping stays correct.
